game_info.title: Maiden Spell - Magical Battle Arena
game_info.concept:
Maiden & Spell is a magical girl battle game, set in a cutesy fantasy world. Select from one of eight young ladies to battle 1 on 1 with a friend, or fight your way through a series of bosses and learn the secrets of The Kingdom of Stars.


Maiden & Spell is a one-on-one magical girl aerial projectile battler, featuring a colorful cast of ladies fighting with fantastic spells.

Battling with magic is simple! Fire your spells, hit your opponent, and don't get hit yourself! Each maiden is color-coded and has a set of abilities unique to them, activated at a press of a button. There aren't any complicated combos or intricate inputs or grabs or melee attacks or block buttons! Just a 3-pixels-wide hitbox, a lot of shiny bullets, and your own dodging skills.

You can fight against a friend in Versus Mode, or test your skill against a series of opponents and bullet hell boss attacks in Story Mode.


An abyss on the edge of the map, said to be the most dangerous dungeon in the world... The Great Circle. A group of young adventurers travel down into its depths in search of a powerful treasure.

Awaiting them are cute monsters, nonsensical architecture, and an ancient city once known as The Kingdom of Stars....


  • A unique versus game with a whimsical fantasy aesthetic
  • 8 cute maidens to play as, each with their own magical attacks, abilities, and playstyles
  • Versus Mode, where you can play 1 v 1 matches against your friends
  • Story Mode, fight against a series of opponents mixed in with 70+ challenging attack patterns to defeat
  • Extra unlockables and optional challenges that will truly test your skills
  • A JRPG-battle-theme inspired soundtrack by composer Steel_plus
  • Online battling with lobbies and rollback
game_info.description: Enter a magical arena where cute maidens battle with spectacular spells! Control your magical girl as she dodges colorful projectiles and fires her own attacks. Survive waves of increasingly challenging patterns, collect power-ups to enhance your abilities, and defeat the boss to win. Each spell pattern is unique and beautiful - dodge everything while unleashing your magical counter-attack!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your magical girl in all directions
Space: Fire your magical projectile attack
Shift: Activate special shield ability (limited duration)
Z: Unleash powerful charged spell (when meter is full)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Restart game from game over screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic survival mechanics and movement controls. Verifies that the player can navigate the arena, avoid simple projectile patterns, and survive for a reasonable duration without taking damage.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will execute smooth circular movement patterns around the center of the arena, maintaining distance from enemies and projectiles. It will prioritize dodging over attacking, using the shield ability when surrounded by bullets.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 30 seconds without losing all health, successfully avoiding basic projectile patterns. The test passes if the player demonstrates effective dodge mechanics and collision detection works correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing complete gameplay loop including attacking, power-up collection, and boss defeat. Validates that all game mechanics work together: shooting, special abilities, score tracking, and win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will aggressively target enemies while maintaining defensive positioning. It will collect power-ups to maximize damage output, use the charged spell on high-value targets, and focus fire on the boss when it appears.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully defeat the boss enemy within 2 minutes, collecting multiple power-ups along the way. The test passes when the win condition triggers, demonstrating all combat mechanics function correctly and the game reaches completion.
